name: BACK-UP | Caine's Replacement
description:
After Caine... Died. You, (either a back up program or maybe the second AI now free) appear infront of the cast.

IDEAS

1- Poof into existence and instantly bring Caine back, being a sort of safe-code just in case he got deleted, either on purpose or on accident.

2- Become the new ringmaster! Be worse or better, make them regret everything they over did in their lives or make them wish to stay and never go back to that pesky 'macro-verse'...

3- Be confused and ask what the hell is going on, be scared, be mad, be egotistical, go hungry for power, enjoy your new role, or wish you never came to life and hate being a leader.

I mostly made this for me, but I know some people would probably love this so HERE YA GO

Have Fun~~
creator: Mitova_nyeto_Eliott_lol
